description: After seeming defeat, Garrett reactivates using more cybernetic enhancements, convinced of his indestructibility. Coulson interrupts his celebration and comedically disintegrates Garrett with the 0-8-4 weapon, providing a final, definitive end to the villain in both dramatic and lighthearted fashion.

transcript.line: There's a reason why they say, “cut off the head.” Now I'll be unstop...
Hey, guys! I found it! Told you it'd be in here.
Stupid, stupid, stupid, and cruel, and very stupid!
I think you've made your point.
